introduction_text: Please complete your visitor pre-registration before arrival. Review the host-approved visit details shown above, then provide your personal information below.
name: visitor-pre-registration-form
success_message: Your pre-registration has been received successfully. Our team will review it and continue the visitor approval process.
title: Visitor Access Pre-Registration
